name: Tecmo
description: Japanese developer and publisher known for Ninja Gaiden, Tecmo Bowl, Dead or Alive, and Monster Rancher.

eras.title: Arcade and NES Era
eras.description: Tecmo's classic arcade and NES identity through Ninja Gaiden, Tecmo Bowl, and Captain Tsubasa.

eras.title: Team Ninja Era
eras.description: Dead or Alive and the 3D Ninja Gaiden revival.

eras.title: Koei Tecmo Legacy Era
eras.description: Tecmo brands continued under Koei Tecmo.

notes: Historic Tecmo identity; modern successor is Koei Tecmo.
